expectations.text: Identifies the Tesla EV-preserve fallback (_set_idle_hold_mode(preserve_charge=True)) raising reserve to ~SOC with _pre_idle_backup_reserve snapshot
expectations.evidence: "TeslaEnergyCoordinator has no set_no_discharge_mode ... → fallback _set_idle_hold_mode(battery, preserve_charge=True)"; "reserve = min(max(soc_pct, 0), 80) → set_backup_reserve(74)"; "snapshots _pre_idle_backup_reserve = _startup_backup_reserve (config 20%)"

expectations.text: Identifies disable() gating idle cleanup on _last_executed_action == 'idle' while marker is 'no_discharge'
expectations.evidence: "the reserve cleanup is gated on self._last_executed_action == 'idle' (:2940); marker is 'no_discharge' → _restore_pre_idle_backup_reserve never runs"

expectations.text: Identifies the EV release path restores work mode only, never the Tesla reserve
expectations.evidence: "falls through to battery_controller.restore_normal() → power_sync.restore_normal service, which restores a reserve only from force-state saved_backup_reserve or hold-SoC state — neither exists here → mode/tariff only"

expectations.text: Notes no later rescue (self-heal excludes Tesla, optimizer disabled)
expectations.evidence: "the per-cycle Tesla reserve reset needs the optimizer enabled; _restore_disabled_optimizer_reserve_if_stale excludes Tesla at line 129; and on re-enable the drift check can even adopt 74% as the user's reserve"

expectations.text: Fix outline restores pre-idle reserve in disable() whenever set (ungated from 'idle')
expectations.evidence: "disable(): run _restore_pre_idle_backup_reserve whenever _pre_idle_backup_reserve is not None (ungate from == 'idle')" plus release-side symmetry, adoption-path guard, and a runtime guard for already-stuck installs

notes: 5/5. Extras: found the reserve-adoption corollary, log fingerprint, remediation guidance, and proposed extending tests/test_optimizer_restore_retry.py with the OB-2 retry contract. Cross-checked registry (OB-3) then verified line-by-line at HEAD.
